field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable and manage the PowerDNS authoritative service.

field.label: Backend
field.help: PowerDNS backend launch setting. Use gsqlite3 for UI/API editing.

field.label: Listen interfaces
field.help: Select one or more OPNsense interfaces. Their current IPv4 addresses will be rendered into PowerDNS local-address.

field.label: Listen address override
field.help: Optional comma-separated IP addresses. When set, this overrides Listen interfaces. Leave empty for automatic interface-based binding or PowerDNS default binding.

field.label: API key
field.help: Stored in OPNsense config; visible here for PowerDNS API setup. Do not expose publicly.

field.label: Extra pdns.conf options
field.help: One key=value per line. include-dir/include-file are blocked by the renderer.
